race.comment: EVER SO READY (2) won on debut at the Gold Coast in December and was turned out for 14 weeks. Resumed with a tiring third to UNLOADING over 1000m at Eagle Farm where he raced handy but didn't quite finish off. Better for that run and the extra trip is going to help. Gets a 2kgs weight swing today and is capable of turning the tables. Despite a lack of betting confidence UNLOADING (1) did a good job to salute on debut at Eagle Farm three weeks ago. Found the line well on that occasion so the extra 110m should hold no fears. ELUSIVE CAPITAL (8) is slowly putting things together this prep. Finished off okay to clock in fourth behind UNLOADING when third up last time out. Nicely in after the claim and should be thereabouts. MAGRITTE (7) last appeared when down the track in the Listed Magic Millions Classic on 17 January. Has raced here three times for three placings. Must be respected. I AM THAT GIRL (14) for the Gollan/Jones team is up in grade but should give a good account.
